channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: 10 Chicagoland prep football programs will play for an IHSA state championship in Normal this week
item.description: Ten Chicagoland prep football programs will play for an Illinois High School Association state championship later this week in Normal. That includes two based in the city and two that will play each other for the state title in Class 8A, the IHSA's largest division.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Rams receiver Demarcus Robinson arrested on suspicion of DUI hours after loss to Eagles
item.description: Following a brutal loss to the Philadelphia Eagles on Sunday night, Los Angeles Rams receiver Demarcus Robinson was arrested on suspicion of DUI after police said he was driving over 100 mph.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ruling in doping case set to give biathlon star Fourcade a gold 15 years after Vancouver Olympics
item.description: LAUSANNE, Switzerland (AP) — Almost 15 years after the Vancouver Olympics, a ruling by sport's highest court in a Russian doping case is set to give French biathlon star Martin Fourcade another gold medal.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Analysis: The Spurs and Magic have fought through adversity. Other teams are searching for answers
item.description: Adversity finds every team in the NBA at some point. Somebody is going to get injured or sick, guaranteed. How those stretches are handled can make or break a season. Orlando and San Antonio are finding a way right now. New Orleans and Philadelphia are among the teams that aren't.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Whittingham uncertain about future at Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - This has been the most disappointing and most frustrating season in Kyle Whittingham's 20 years as head coach of the Utah football team. But will Whittingham be back for a 21st season? He has a decision to make in the coming weeks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Wake up the ghosts! Texas, Texas A&M rivalry that dates to 1894 is reborn
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Any Texas or Texas A&M player has heard the lore of the rivalry between the two schools, a grudge match that dates to 1894.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO and KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Formula 1 expands grid to add General Motors' Cadillac brand and new American team for 2026 season
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Formula 1 on Monday at last said it will expand its grid in 2026 to make room for an American team that is partnered with General Motors. “As the pinnacle of motorsports, F1 demands boundary-pushing innovation and excellence.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lightning host Avalanche for 'Hockey Fights Cancer' night
item.description: Although it's just another hockey game on the schedule for the lightning, tonight is bigger than that and means more than just the sport.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: SJSU trans women's volleyball player Blaire Fleming gets green light to play conference tourney
item.description: San Jose State's transgender women's volleyball player given the OK to play in the Mountain West Conference tournament, a judge ruled on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Broncos def. Raiders 29-19
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The Denver Broncos overcame a sluggish start to secure a 29-19 win over the Las Vegas Raiders on Sunday, thanks to a second-half spark from quarterback Bo Nix.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Montrose football dominates, off to State Final Four
item.description: The Montrose Red Hawks delivered a commanding performance in the third round of the Class 4A playoffs, defeating Mesa Ridge 53-21 on Friday night to secure their spot in the semifinals.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: St. Louis Blues fire Drew Bannister and hire Jim Montgomery as coach
item.description: Drew Bannister is out as coach of the St. Louis Blues after less than a full calendar year on the job. Jim Montgomery is back behind the bench of an NHL team five days after he was fired by the Boston Bruins.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: LaVine, Dosunmu and White power the Bulls to a 136-122 win over the Hawks
item.description: Zach LaVine scored 26 points, Ayo Dosunmu and Coby White each had 20 and the Chicago Bulls beat the Atlanta Hawks 136-122 on Friday night in an NBA Cup game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Purdy, Bosa out for Green Bay matchup, Allen steps up as QB
item.description: (KRON) – San Francisco 49ers head coach Kyle Shanahan announced in a press conference Friday that quarterback Brock Purdy will be out for Sunday’s game against the Green Bay Packers. Purdy injured his right shoulder in last Sunday's loss to the Seattle Seahawks.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: No ball at Tropicana Field in 2026 after Milton; new ballpark deal dies: Tampa Bay Rays
item.description: The St. Petersburg City Council has voted to spend over $23 million to repair Tropicana Field after Hurricane Milton destroyed the roof on the home of the Tampa Bay Rays.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WGN 9

item.title: Ohtani wins unanimous MVP after historic first season with Dodgers
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers' superstar Shohei Ohtani is the 2024 National League Most Valuable Player. It was a unanimous decision to award the Japanese phenom the 2024 MVP, and in doing so, create another historic moment as he becomes the first full-time designated hitter to win it.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Cubs trade for Cleveland reliever Eli Morgan; Wisdom DFA'd
item.description: CLEVELAND, Ind. — The Cubs are trading for Cleveland relief pitcher Eli Morgan. As a result of adding Morgan to the 40-man, Patrick Wisdom was designated for assignment. Morgan, 28, had the best season of his career in 2024 with a 1.93 ERA with Cleveland in 42 innings.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Hillsborough County man files lawsuit against Netflix over Tyson-Paul fight streaming issues
item.description: A class action lawsuit was filed in Hillsborough County on Monday against Netflix over alleged streaming issues during the fight between legendary brawler Mike Tyson and former YouTuber Jake Paul.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: BYU and Arizona State both have exceeded expectations
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU is still in the College Football Playoffs as of now, but they desperately need a win over #21 Arizona State in Tempe this Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
